title: Implement SX127x.cs Renode peripheral for register-based SPI (SX1276)
description: Adapt from SX1262.cs and LR1110.cs. Implement RegOpMode (0x01), RegFifo (0x00), RegIrqFlags (0x12), RegDioMapping1, FIFO read/write, Sleep/Standby/TX/RX modes, IRQ on DIO0 for TxDone/RxDone. Bridge to lichen-sim TCP same as others. Add SPDX, document key registers/opcodes in comments. Mimic style exactly. Only edit this new file.
close_reason: Implemented register-based SX127x peripheral by adapting SX1262.cs/LR1110.cs, updated class name, header with key registers, IRQ bits for SX1276, fixed comments. Mimicked style. Commit 2c543b0d0
